items.name: Gucci Savoy Small Hat Box
items.description: This item is part of the Gucci Savoy line, a selection of travel pieces that pay homage to Guccio Gucci’s beginnings as a porter at the London hotel. This small hat box combines vintage-inspired details with emblematic House codes. The GG logo continues to be an established symbol, while the Web stripe pays homage to Gucci's equestrian roots. The style is completed by brown leather details.
